my husband and i both desperately needed slippers and so i searched for amazonprimeeligible slippers and decided on these for him while they were on a great sale under he wears them constantly at home putting them on immediately when he gets home and leaving them by the door where his outside shoes are when he leaves for anywhere in other words when hes home he wears them we have a home that is partially carpeted and partially hard wood and we dont wear outside shoes in the house he says the slippers are good on both surfaces we also have stairs and he says they are good on the stairs doesnt fall out of them as with some slippers i only wish i had gotten them for myself as well because the dearfoams df i got for me that were twice the price and have already become awful the inside padding moves and becomes very uncomfortable i like these tamaracs so much id like to find them in another color in my size to buy for me no more silly pretty slippers for me i want comfort and usability these slippers have that in spades might not even wait for them to be on sale they are much better value than dearfoams for sure

looks as if some people paid up to for this i paid around and i feel that is a fair price someone said something about it being a weird color it is black it is the same faux black leather look you are used to seeing with a nice black satin ribbon is this your regular victorian era corset that will withstand someone with their foot on a wall tightening you into it no it is a costume piece an accessory a decoration however it does support i matched the stats for a large size based on the chart so i got a large and it fits great i think you will find that this product looks just like it does in the photos one warning i have a d bust and i find it somewhat difficult to uh how should i say not trap them under this at least slightly so be aware if you have a larger bust that this will require more than little adjusting
